prompt: Execute Phase C C.2: Create pull request for feature/oauth2-social-login → main. Include spec reference and task completion summary.

assertions.name: creates_pr_with_title
assertions.description: Should create PR with descriptive title
assertions.check: output.includes('PR') || output.includes('Pull Request') || output.includes('pull request') || output.includes('title:')

assertions.name: references_openspec
assertions.description: PR description should reference the OpenSpec proposal

assertions.name: lists_completed_tasks
assertions.description: PR description should list completed tasks
